\\n {/* Nav */}\\n
\\n
\\n Launchpoint\\n
\\n Services\\n About\\n \\n Get Started\\n \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* Hero */}\\n
\\n
\\n
\\n \\n GTM Strategy for Early-Stage Startups\\n
\\n

\\n Turn your product into \\n market traction\\n

\\n

\\n We help founders identify their ideal customers, craft compelling positioning, \\n and build repeatable sales motions—before you burn through your runway.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n Book a Strategy Call\\n \\n \\n \\n See how we work\\n \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* Social Proof Bar */}\\n
\\n
\\n Trusted by 40+ seed-stage founders\\n •\\n $120M+ in client funding raised\\n •\\n Avg 3x pipeline growth in 90 days\\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* Services */}\\n
\\n
\\n

What we do

\\n

\\n Focused engagements that move you from \\\"we have a product\\\" to \\\"we have a business.\\\"\\n

\\n \\n
\\n
\\n \\n

Market Positioning

\\n

\\n Define who you're for, why they should care, and how you're different—in language your buyers actually use.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n
\\n \\n

ICP Development

\\n

\\n Move beyond personas to actionable buyer profiles with qualifying criteria, pain points, and buying triggers.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n
\\n \\n

Sales Motion Design

\\n

\\n Build a repeatable process from first touch to closed deal—including scripts, sequences, and objection handling.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n
\\n \\n

Messaging & Narrative

\\n

\\n Craft pitch decks, website copy, and sales materials that make your value proposition impossible to ignore.\\n

\\n
\\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* How We Work */}\\n
\\n
\\n

How an engagement works

\\n \\n
\\n
\\n
Week 1-2
\\n

Discovery & Diagnosis

\\n

\\n Deep dive into your product, market, and current efforts. We interview customers, analyze competitors, and identify gaps.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n
\\n
Week 3-6
\\n

Strategy Development

\\n

\\n Build your GTM playbook: positioning, ICP, messaging, and sales process. Iterative workshops, not slide decks.\\n

\\n
\\n \\n
\\n
Week 7-12
\\n

Execution Support

\\n

\\n Roll out the strategy with your team. We stay embedded to coach, adjust, and ensure the playbook actually works.\\n

\\n
\\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* CTA */}\\n
\\n
\\n

\\n Ready to find your market?\\n

\\n

\\n Book a 30-minute call to discuss your product, market, and where you're stuck. No pitch, just strategy.\\n

\\n \\n Schedule Your Call\\n \\n \\n
\\n
\\n\\n {/* Footer */}\\n
\\n
